description: Live GitHub + WakaTime activity over the last 7 days.

data.summary: This week, Ethan Qiu logged 2 hrs 33 mins of coding time, with a daily average of 2 hrs 22 mins across 5 projects. His work was mostly in TypeScript, which accounted for 46% of tracked time, followed by JSON at 14%, JavaScript at 12%, and Java at 8%. No GitHub commits, pull requests, or new repositories were recorded in the data provided.
